name: notifications
description: Inbox in-app (wave v1.3 #21): per-user notifications written only via the internal producer target notifications:create (producer #1 = comment_reply from comments addComment; never self-notify). Recipients read/mark ONLY their own rows (userId from ctx, by_user_read). Unread-first bounded listMine, capped unreadCount badge. Views: NotificationBell({onNavigate?}) + NotificationInbox({onNavigate?}).
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-13, agent beta): STATUS row #21 (wave v1.3). Schema table `notifications` pre-added by alpha (DATA-MODEL SSOT) — implemented exactly; no schema edits. create is INTERNAL (generic producer target; typed ref in convex/features/notifications/refs.ts, path contract `features/notifications/notifications:create` — epsilon #22 duplicates the ref, no cross-feature import). No dedupe window (prompt: optional — TODO(rr) marker in notifications.ts). href validated relative-only (no open redirect via producers). Producer #1 wired in convex/features/comments/notify.ts + 2-line addComment hook; self-reply-no-notif + own-rows-only + denied paths + markRead idempotency all tested (notifications.test.ts, queries.test.ts, producer.test.ts). Copy-first: adapted from rr `notifications-center` (bell + popover shape) onto our Convex hooks — no adapter layer, shadcn popover/scroll-area/separator already vendored. formatRelativeTime duplicated from comments (2nd occurrence — hoist-to-shared proposal in beta's report).
